arts.ttl: Neymar reveals he taught Lionel Messi something that helped him win World Cup
arts.sum: Speaking on the Podpah podcast, Neymar revealed that Messi once asked him for advice on penalty kicks during a training session. While Messi has converted numerous crucial penalties throughout his career, Neymar's insight shows that even the greatest players continue learning and refining their skills.

arts.ttl: World Cup ambition could see Neymar return to FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta and Neymar’s agent Pini Zahavi maintain an excellent relationship with Zahavi also looking after affairs for Barça coach Hansi Flick. Neymar’s big motivation will be to feature for the Brazilian national side at the 2026 World Cup and playing for Barcelona at the renovated Camp Nou is a powerful attraction for the striker who is anxious to return to the global limelight after a wretched injury hampered spell with Al Hilal in Riyadh.

arts.ttl: Barcelona have opened talks over Neymar’s return
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have kicked into gear negotiations with the entourage of Santos and Brazil superstar Neymar Jr, over a potential reunion. That’s according to transfer…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Transfer News: Vinicius Junior set to SMASH Neymar transfer record
arts.sum: And The Telegraph is reporting that one of the Saudi Pro League clubs owned by the nation's Public Investment Fund (PIF) will be given the chance to bid for Vini Jr. and potentially match or even surpass the €222 million fee that PSG paid Barcelona to sign Neymar back in 2017. That fee smashed the world record at the time and has proven a fee that no one club is willing to match or surpass, but the Saudi Pro League may be about to change all that with Vini potentially joining one of Al-Ahli, Al-Hilal, Al-Ittihad or Al-Nassr.

arts.ttl: Santos 2025 Home Kit Teased - First Since Neymar's Comeback
arts.sum: Santos has shared two teaser images of their new 2025 home strip.
